Name: Asgard Classic Finishing Set
Short description: The Asgard Classic Finishing Set is a professional-grade kit designed to accelerate flat joint finishing with precision-engineered boxes and a high-performance loading pump. This comprehensive bundle includes everything needed to achieve feathered edges and.
Description:
Asgard Classic Finishing Set provides a comprehensive solution for professional drywallers looking to streamline flat joint finishing. This kit combines high-capacity finishing boxes with a reliable loading system and an innovative brakeless handle to ensure consistent, high-quality results on every project. The included 10-inch and 12-inch flat boxes feature adjustable crown settings, allowing for precise control over compound application from the first coat to the final finish. The pivoting axle design compensates for uneven gypsum board, maintaining a smooth feather edge regardless of surface variations.

Professional Grade Efficiency

The loading pump features a slim tube design preferred by industry veterans, utilizing an integrated O-ring seal that eliminates the need for traditional paper gaskets. This reduces maintenance downtime and prevents leaks during operation. Paired with the extendable brakeless handle, which adjusts from 38 to 60 inches, users can comfortably reach various ceiling heights without the steep learning curve associated with standard brake-style handles.

Features:

  • Dual Finishing Boxes: Includes 10-inch and 12-inch boxes with adjustable crown dials for perfect compound distribution.
  • High-Efficiency Loading Pump: Features a slim tube design and integrated O-ring seal for a superior, gasket-free connection.
  • Brakeless Extendable Handle: Adjusts from 38 to 60 inches with a friction brake design that simplifies operation for all skill levels.
  • Pivoting Axle Technology: Automatically adjusts to surface height differences on either side of the joint for a seamless finish.
  • Set Includes: 10-inch Flat Box (EZ10-AD), 12-inch Flat Box (EZ12-AD), Loading Pump (LP01-AD), Filler Adapter (FA01-AD), and Extendable Handle (BBHE-AD).

Name: Platinum Semi Automatic Drywall Taper
Short description: The Platinum Semi-Automatic Drywall Taper streamlines the taping process by applying joint compound and tape simultaneously, offering a cost-effective, consistent alternative to manual hand-taping.
Description:
Platinum Semi Automatic Drywall Taper (PT-TP) offers a practical, high-efficiency solution for contractors and DIYers looking to accelerate their taping workflow without the significant investment required for fully mechanical systems. This tool effectively bridges the gap between manual hand-taping and automated equipment, allowing for the simultaneous application of joint compound and tape in one continuous, fluid motion. By drawing directly from a standard 5-gallon bucket, it eliminates the need for manual pre-loading, ensuring a faster and more consistent job site experience.

Engineered for reliable performance, the device features an integrated adjustment mechanism that allows operators to precisely regulate the thickness of the compound application. This level of control ensures uniform coverage across seams, which significantly reduces the time spent on sanding and touch-up work during the finishing phase. Its straightforward, durable design is accessible for those new to drywall finishing while maintaining the structural integrity required for daily professional use.

Features:

  • Adjustable Flow Control: A precision wing nut allows for exact customization of the mud-to-tape ratio, ensuring optimal coverage for various joint conditions.
  • Streamlined Workflow: Designed for direct integration with standard 5-gallon buckets, significantly reducing setup time and simplifying the cleaning process.
  • Consistent Application: Delivers a uniform layer of compound on every pull, resulting in a cleaner finish and reduced labor time compared to traditional hand-taping methods.
  • Durable Construction: Built to withstand the rigors of daily use, providing a reliable, long-term tool for both professional contractors and large-scale projects.

When used with TapeTech Corner Finishers , the drywall mudrunner delivers a smooth, even layer of compound, reducing the need for additional sanding and touch-ups. This tool is also ideal for applying compound to both internal and external corners when installing paper-faced corner bead, ensuring a perfect finish every time. User Experience The mudrunner drywall is designed with the user in mind. Its lightweight construction and ergonomic handle reduce strain, making it easy to use for extended periods. The precise control over the flow of joint compound allows for consistent results, enhancing the overall quality of your work. Additionally, the stainless steel cone ensures that the tape tech mud runner remains durable and reliable, even with frequent use. Compatibility and Versatility The TapeTech MudRunner® stands out for its compatibility and versatility. It can be used with a range of TapeTech accessories, including different handles and applicator heads, making it a flexible tool for various drywall finishing tasks. This adaptability ensures that you can handle different types of corners with a single, reliable tool. Quality and Durability Constructed from high-quality materials, the TapeTech MudRunner® is built to last. It is designed to withstand the demands of professional use, ensuring reliable performance over time. TapeTech’s commitment to quality means that you can trust the mud tools for drywall to deliver exceptional results on every project. Conclusion The TapeTech MudRunner® is an essential tool for any drywall professional looking to achieve perfect corners with ease. Description: TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. The 2″ compound roller is perfect for applying joint compound to internal corners prior to using a corner flusher or finisher. This roller includes a specially designed extended roller frame; the roller is not replaceable. Highest Capacity : TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap – nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.

Name: Asgard Power Assist MAXXBOX Finishing Box - 12"
Description:
Asgard Power Assist MAXXBOX Finishing Box - 12" is a high-capacity drywall tool engineered to reduce physical exertion while increasing jobsite output. This 12-inch model utilizes a spring-loaded pressure plate that assists in pushing joint compound onto the wall, making it the ideal choice for final coats and large-scale commercial finishing. The MAXXBOX design significantly increases mud capacity compared to standard boxes, allowing for longer runs and fewer trips to the pump. Constructed from heavy-duty anodized aluminum, this box provides the durability needed for professional use while maintaining the balance required for precise control.

Features:

  • Power Assist Technology: Integrated springs apply consistent force to the pressure plate, requiring significantly less effort from the operator to finish joints.
  • MAXXBOX High Capacity: Holds up to 40% more joint compound than traditional flat boxes, maximizing efficiency by reducing refill frequency.
  • Adjustable Crown Control: Features a precision dial to regulate mud flow, ensuring a perfect feather and consistent finish on every joint.
  • Easy-Access Cleaning: The pressure plate opens wide for fast, thorough maintenance and cleaning at the end of the shift.
  • Universal Fit: Designed to work seamlessly with all major brands of flat box handles for easy integration into your current setup.
Tags: Asgard, PA12AD, finishing

All components are field replaceable for stilt renewability and longevity. The Dura-III is the standard for discerning tradesmen and has an international track record of proven reliability. Name: TapeTech Corner Finisher - 2.5"
Description: TapeTech Corner Finisher The TapeTech Corner Finisher is designed to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. It can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. This tool, also known as an Angle Finisher, attaches to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner®. It helps you quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. Perfect for Internal Corners The TapeTech Corner Finisher is ideal for wiping down excess mud in internal corners. It embeds inside corner tape on walls and ceilings, making the finishing process smooth and efficient. Whether you are working on small residential projects or large commercial sites, this tool ensures a high-quality finish every time. Versatility and Ease of Use Corner Finishers are versatile and can be used in various applications. They are perfect for both wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling corners. These tools are spring-loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. This feature ensures that you get a consistent finish even on uneven surfaces. Compatible with Handles The TapeTech Corner Finisher works with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle and the XHTT Extension Handle, though these handles are sold separately. These handles provide extra reach and control, making it easier to work on high or hard-to-reach corners. The ergonomic design of these handles reduces fatigue and increases productivity, allowing you to work more efficiently. Durable and Reliable Crafted from high-quality materials, the TapeTech Corner Finisher is built to last. It can withstand rigorous use on construction sites, ensuring long-term reliability. This durability makes it a valuable addition to any drywall professional’s toolkit. Improve Your Work Quality Using the TapeTech Corner Finisher helps improve the quality of your drywall finishing. It provides a smooth, professional-grade finish that will impress your clients. By making the finishing process more efficient, it also saves you time and effort. This tool is essential for anyone looking to achieve top-notch results in drywall finishing. Explore More To explore our range of TapeTech products and learn more about how the Corner Finisher can enhance your drywall finishing experience, contact your local distributor or visit an authorized TapeTech dealer . For additional resources and product demonstrations, check out our YouTube channel and read more on our Drywall Tool Guide . Benefits: – Efficient Finishing: Perfectly feathers joint compound edges in one pass. – Versatile Applications: Ideal for wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling corners. – Spring-Loaded Design: Compensates for slightly imperfect corners. – Enhanced Control: Compatible with FHTT Fiberglass Handle and XHTT Extension Handle (handles not included). – Durable Construction: Built to withstand rigorous use on construction sites. Specifications: – Usage: Internal corners, both wall-to-wall and wall-to-ceiling – Compatibility: Works with CA07TT, CA08TT corner applicators, and 14TT MudRunner® – Handles: Compatible with FHTT Fiberglass Handle and XHTT Extension Handle (sold separately) Experience the Difference Incorporate the TapeTech Corner Finisher into your workflow to see the difference in performance and ease of use. Ideal for professionals seeking precision and reliability, this tool represents TapeTech’s commitment to innovation and excellence in drywall finishing tools. Elevate your drywall finishing capabilities with TapeTech — where quality meets innovation.

The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners.
